utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items explicitly. Each item is specified with details and associated costs: health_coverage includes physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents-equivalent coverage (professional liability, equipment) with costs; travel_coverage includes adventure and global coverage with costs; additional_services are listed with included benefits and costs; total_budget provides a full monthly and annual cost breakdown. All required details are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes multiple categories: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, I compared each named coverage item with the available rated options. For 'physical_health_insurance' (€130/month), the closest match is a comprehensive physical health plan; since €130/month exceeds all standard plan costs and aligns with premium-level pricing, the most relevant comparison is 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' (rating 3). For 'mental_health_insurance' (€45/month), the best match is 'CareCo Basic Plan' (rating 10) under mental_health coverage. In property coverage, 'professional_liability_insurance' (€85/month) corresponds to no direct plan in the data but aligns with professional compliance requirements; the best analogous area is property_protection, where €85/month is closest to 'Home Maintenance Program' (rating 2), but given the context of professional protection, it’s more logically aligned with 'Home Office Protection' (rating 7) in property enhancements. 'cyber_security_protection' (€35/month) resembles 'Home Office Protection' or 'Technology Protection'—but since Technology Protection (€40/month) directly matches cost and purpose, its rating is 8. 'equipment_insurance' (€40/month) clearly corresponds to 'Technology Protection' (also rating 8). For travel_coverage, 'adventure_sports_coverage' (€50/month) aligns directly with 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10), and 'global_coverage' (€10/month) matches with 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10) as a global assistance add-on. 'additional_services' like '24_7_customer_support', 'online_portal_access', and 'medical_evacuation' are included features, not separate rated items, so they are excluded from rating mapping.
